content.verdict: Kapari Natural Resort is a quiet, adults-preferred hideaway in Imerovigli — the highest point of the caldera rim — where the crowds of Oia and Fira feel comfortably far away. Built in a natural Cycladic style with rough stone, lime-washed walls, and hand-crafted wood, the 17-room resort emphasizes texture and authenticity over glitz. For honeymooners who want the Santorini view without the cruise-ship chaos, Imerovigli is the sweet spot, and Kapari is one of its most serene addresses. The hotel is small enough to feel personal — you'll recognize the staff by day two.
content.best_room: A Honeymoon Suite with outdoor jacuzzi and caldera view — private terrace, heated hot tub facing the sunset, and a layout designed for couples. If you can stretch the budget, the Kapari Suite adds a private plunge pool.

itinerary_7_nights.description: Airport pickup, welcome drinks, relaxed first night with in-suite dinner.

itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning walk along the Imerovigli-Oia caldera path (one of the best walks in Greece, about 2 hours one way), taxi back, pool afternoon.

itinerary_7_nights.description: Breakfast in suite, wine tour at Santo Wines and Venetsanos, sunset from your terrace.

itinerary_7_nights.description: Beach day at Perissa (black sand) or Red Beach, dinner in Fira.

itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning yoga, spa afternoon (treatments arranged in-suite), sunset dinner at the hotel restaurant.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Slow breakfast, late checkout, transfer to airport
itinerary_7_nights.description: Slow breakfast, late checkout, transfer to airport.

caveats: Not strictly adults-only — older children are allowed, though the vibe is overwhelmingly couples.
Some rooms have partial rather than full caldera view; specify when booking.
The walk to Imerovigli's main square is a few minutes but involves steps.
No full spa on site — treatments are in-suite or at partner facilities.
Food is good but not destination-level; plan dinners out at Mezzo, La Maison, and Anogi in Imerovigli.

faqs.a: No, but the atmosphere is strongly couples-oriented and the hotel markets to honeymooners. Children are rare.
Imerovigli sits on the highest point of the caldera rim, between Fira and Oia. It's quieter than both and offers the best panoramic view of the caldera.

faqs.q: Does every room have a caldera view?
faqs.a: Most do, but views vary in angle. Confirm specifically when booking — pay for a full-view room.

faqs.q: How do we get around the island?
faqs.a: Private transfers, taxis, or a rental car. ATVs are popular but not recommended for couples with luggage.
No on-site beach. Perissa, Perivolos, and Kamari (all black sand) are 20-30 minutes by car.

faqs.q: What makes Imerovigli better than Oia?
faqs.a: Same caldera, same sunset, half the crowds. You can walk or drive to Oia easily when you want the scene.
